column2: An event will appear, showing all of the sources of the §Y[Root.Religion.GetName]§! faith's §Ymoral authority§!.\n\nNB: No changes will occur as a result of this decision.
§YPermanently§! change the §Ymoral authority§! of the §Y[Root.Religion.GetName]§! faith.
§YTemporarily§! change the §Ymoral authority§! of the §Y[Root.Religion.GetName]§! faith (for §Y3 years§!).
An event will appear, showing all of the sources of the §Y[Root.Religion.GetName]§! faith's §Ymoral authority§!.\n\nNB: No changes will occur as a result of this decision.
§YPermanently§! change the §Ymoral authority§! of the §Y[Root.Religion.GetName]§! faith.
§YTemporarily§! change the §Ymoral authority§! of the §Y[Root.Religion.GetName]§! faith (for §Y3 years§!).
Is NOT currently adding a permanent MA modifier to any religion
Has been adding a permanent MA modifier to a religion for at least 1 year
Is NOT currently adding a temporary MA modifier to any religion
Has been adding a temporary MA modifier to a religion for at least 1 year
An event will be shown, where you will be able to choose the size of the change in moral authority.
All §P(ED:MP:Intf)§M Change MA§! decisions are §Rblocked§! (until the process has completed, or a year has elapsed)
!!!ERROR!!!\nSomething went wrong!\nPlease exit and try again

This menu allows you to PERMANENTLY increase or decrease the moral authority of the [edmp_interference_religion_affected.GetName] faith.\nPlease be ESPECIALLY CAREFUL because these changes can NEVER be removed (they can only be offset by adding the same number of modifers, with the opposite effect)!

This menu allows you to TEMPORARILY increase or decrease the moral authority of the [edmp_interference_religion_affected.GetName] faith (for 3 years).\nPlease note that these changes can NEVER be manually removed (the only way to remove them is to wait until they expire)!

This menu allows you to choose the exact size of the PERMANENT increase in the moral authority of the [edmp_interference_religion_affected.GetName] faith.\nPlease be ESPECIALLY CAREFUL because these changes can NEVER be removed (they can only be offset by adding the same number of modifers, with the opposite effect)!

This menu allows you to choose the exact size of the TEMPORARY increase in the moral authority of the [edmp_interference_religion_affected.GetName] faith (for 3 years).\nPlease note that these changes can NEVER be manually removed (the only way to remove them is to wait until they expire)!

This menu allows you to choose the exact size of the PERMANENT decrease in the moral authority of the [edmp_interference_religion_affected.GetName] faith.\nPlease be ESPECIALLY CAREFUL because these changes can NEVER be removed (they can only be offset by adding the same number of modifers, with the opposite effect)!

This menu allows you to choose the exact size of the TEMPORARY decrease in the moral authority of the [edmp_interference_religion_affected.GetName] faith (for 3 years).\nPlease note that these changes can NEVER be manually removed (the only way to remove them is to wait until they expire)!

The tooltip for the event option below contains the full moral authority breakdown for the [edmp_interference_religion_affected.GetName] faith, as would be shown in the religion screen for a character of that religion.
